description: Code quality refactoring and reflection documentation. Refactor the Lambda handler for better modularity and naming. Add a 'Phase 15: Code Quality, Test Coverage & Reflection' section to EXPERIMENT.md documenting what was done, observations on coverage gaps, and reflections on the project state.
steps: Refactor lambda/audio-processor/index.ts: (1) Extract the validation logic into a dedicated validateEvent() function that throws on invalid input, improving readability and testability. (2) Extract the processing logic for text files and audio files into named helper functions (processTextFile, processAudioFile). (3) Add JSDoc comments to exported functions and key helpers. (4) Ensure all existing tests still pass after refactoring.

Add a new section to EXPERIMENT.md titled '## Phase 15: Code Quality, Test Coverage & Reflection' after the Conclusion section (before References). Document: (1) Current test coverage metrics (100% statements/lines/functions, 90%+ branches). (2) What the tidy-up phase improved (coverage config, CI coverage reporting, Lambda modularity). (3) Observations on what worked well in the project (TDD caught all regressions, incremental approach prevented debt). (4) Any remaining technical debt or areas for future improvement. (5) Final test count after this phase.
Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest --coverage' to verify all tests still pass after refactoring.
Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx tsc --noEmit' to verify TypeScript compilation succeeds.
acceptance_criteria: Lambda handler has validation logic extracted into a validateEvent() function
Lambda handler has processing logic split into processTextFile and processAudioFile helpers
EXPERIMENT.md has a Phase 15 section with reflections and coverage metrics
All existing tests pass without modification (demonstrating safe refactoring)
verification: Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest --coverage' and verify all tests pass
Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx tsc --noEmit' and verify no compilation errors
findings: Refactoring successful - all 200 tests passed without modification. Extracted validateEvent(), processTextFile(), processAudioFile() as named helpers. Added JSDoc to all key functions. Snapshot updated for Lambda code hash change. Phase 15 section added to EXPERIMENT.md with coverage metrics (200 tests, 100% statements/lines/functions, 96.66% branches), improvements list, reflections, technical debt notes, and final assessment. TypeScript compiles without errors.
